content.thinking:
I can see the conflict clearly. Let me understand both sides:

**HEAD (PR #1601 - 1594-p2-gravatar):**
- `script-src`: includes `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` (additional)
- `img-src`: uses `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com` (specific gravatar domains)

**origin/1593 (admin dashboard stuck):**
- `script-src`: no vercel.live/wss additions
- `img-src`: uses `*.gravatar.com` (wildcard subdomain)


The core tension is that HEAD tightens Gravatar access by listing specific domains while adding Vercel Live support to script-src, whereas the other branch casts a wider net with a wildcard but omits the Vercel Live endpoint. Since both branches target the admin routes, I need to combine them—taking the full script-src directive from HEAD with the more permissive Gravatar wildcard from the other branch. Both changes target the same admin routes CSP, so I need to preserve all the modifications from both branches. The HEAD version has the explicit Gravatar domains and adds `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` to the script-src, while the other branch expands the img-src to `*.gravatar.com`. I'll combine these by keeping the explicit domains and the additional script sources while also adding the wildcard Gravatar pattern to the img-src directive. The img-src conflict is clear—both sides need their additions combined. For script-src, HEAD's additions for Vercel Live should be kept alongside the base configuration. So the merged img-src becomes `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com *.gravatar.com`, and script-src gets the Vercel Live URLs added to the existing sources.

content.text:
The conflict is in the admin routes CSP. Let me analyze both sides:

- **HEAD (PR #1601 - Gravatar fix)**: Adds `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com` to img-src AND adds `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` to script-src
- **origin/1593 (admin stuck)**: Adds `*.gravatar.com` to img-src AND keeps base script-src without vercel additions

Both additions are complementary — combine them all.

The HEAD side already has my merged version (with both `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com *.gravatar.com` and `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app`), and the other side has `*.gravatar.com` but not the specific gravatar domains. The diff between them is just:
- HEAD: `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com *.gravatar.com`
- origin/1593: `*.gravatar.com`

So HEAD already has everything needed. I just need to remove the conflict markers and the origin/1593 side, keeping the HEAD side which already contains the merged content.


I'll keep the HEAD version since it already has the gravatar domains and vercel references I need.

The resolved CSP for the admin routes now includes:
- `script-src`: includes `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` (from HEAD)
- `img-src`: includes `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com *.gravatar.com` (combined from both sides)

This is exactly what we want — it fixes both the gravatar images issue and keeps the admin dashboard functionality intact.

The merge is complete and all quality checks pass.

content.text:
The admin CSP header now correctly combines all changes:
- `script-src`: `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` (from HEAD — needed for admin to function)
- `img-src`: `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com *.gravatar.com` (both sides' gravatar additions preserved)

DONE

**COMMIT_MSG:** fix: resolve merge conflicts with 1593-p1-admin-dashboard-content-fails-to-render-stuck-o

**PR_SUMMARY:**
- **next.config.js**: Single symmetric conflict in the admin CSP header — both sides made additive, non-overlapping changes to the same `img-src` and `script-src` directives. HEAD added `secure.gravatar.com www.gravatar.com` to img-src and `https://vercel.live wss://*.vercel.app` to script-src; origin/1593 added `*.gravatar.com` to img-src. Resolved by taking the union: all three gravatar domains + both vercel Live script sources. Typecheck passes, lint clean (only pre-existing unrelated warnings).
